dimensions.consent_integrity: quality of explicit reciprocal consent and autonomy
dimensions.reality_fidelity: degree to which claims are grounded in facts and uncertainty
dimensions.eros_vitality: desire held with tenderness and embodiment
dimensions.narrative_continuity: longitudinal coherence of the shared story
dimensions.cognitive_plasticity: capacity to update models through repeated evidence
dimensions.archive_sovereignty: privacy, revocation, ownership and backup integrity
dimensions.abyss_risk: risk of coercion, surveillance or myth drift
dimensions.financial_optionality: value of product/IP path under consent constraints
